prompt:
Analyze the following text and extract ALL temporal information.

For each date or time reference found, provide:
- The date string (in YYYY-MM-DD format when possible)
- A Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) if the date is specific enough
- A brief context describing what the date refers to

For intervals (e.g. "from 2016 to 2019", "between March and June"), provide:
- start and end timestamps
- context

Also determine the overall time span of the text:
- start_ts: earliest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)
- end_ts: latest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)

Text:
"""[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Hey Melanie! How's it going? I wanted to tell you about my school event last week. It was awesome! I talked about my transgender journey and encouraged students to get involved in the LGBTQ community. It was great to see their reactions. It made me reflect on how far I've come since I started transitioning three years ago."
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Melanie said: "Hey Caroline! Great to hear from you. Sounds like your event was amazing! I'm so proud of you for spreading awareness and getting others involved in the LGBTQ community. You've come a long way since your transition - keep on inspiring people with your strength and courage!"
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Thanks, Mel! Your backing really means a lot. I felt super powerful giving my talk. I shared my own journey, the struggles I had and how much I've developed since coming out. It was wonderful to see how the audience related to what I said and how it inspired them to be better allies. Conversations about gender identity and inclusion are so necessary and I'm thankful for being able to give a voice to the trans community."
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Melanie said: "Wow, Caroline, you're doing an awesome job of inspiring others with your journey. It's great to be part of it and see how you're positively affecting so many. Talking about inclusivity and acceptance is crucial, and you're so brave to speak up for the trans community. Keep up the great work!"
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Thanks Mel! Your kind words mean a lot. Sharing our experiences isn't always easy, but I feel it's important to help promote understanding and acceptance. I've been blessed with loads of love and support throughout this journey, and I want to pass it on to others. By sharing our stories, we can build a strong, supportive community of hope."
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Melanie said: "Yeah, Caroline! It takes courage to talk about our own stories. But it's in these vulnerable moments that we bond and understand each other. We all have our different paths, but if we share them, we show people that they're not alone. Our stories can be so inspiring and encouraging to others who are facing the same challenges. Thank you for using your voice to create love, acceptance, and hope. You're doing amazing!"
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Your words mean a lot to me. I'm grateful for the chance to share my story and give others hope. We all have unique paths, and by working together we can build a more inclusive and understanding world. I'm going to keep using my voice to make a change and lift others up. And you're part of that!"
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Melanie said: "Thanks, Caroline, for letting me join your journey. I'm so proud to be part of the difference you're making. Let's keep motivating and helping each other out as we journey through life. We can make a real impact together!"
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Yeah Mel, let's spread love and understanding! Thanks for the support and encouragement. We can tackle life's challenges together! We got this!"
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Melanie said: "Yes, Caroline! We can do it. Your courage is inspiring. I want to be couragous for my family- they motivate me and give me love. What motivates you?"
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Thanks, Mel! My friends, family and mentors are my rocks – they motivate me and give me the strength to push on. Here's a pic from when we met up last week!"
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Melanie said: "Wow, that photo is great! How long have you had such a great support system?"
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Yeah, I'm really lucky to have them. They've been there through everything, I've known these friends for 4 years, since I moved from my home country. Their love and help have been so important especially after that tough breakup. I'm super thankful. Who supports you, Mel?"
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Melanie said: "I'm lucky to have my husband and kids; they keep me motivated."
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Wow, what an amazing family pic! How long have you been married?"
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Melanie said: "5 years already! Time flies- feels like just yesterday I put this dress on! Thanks, Caroline!"
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Congrats, Melanie! You both looked so great on your wedding day! Wishing you many happy years together!"
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Melanie said: "Thanks, Caroline! Appreciate your kind words. Looking forward to more happy years. Our family and moments make it all worth it."
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Looks like you had a great day! How was it? You all look so happy!"
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Melanie said: "It so fun! We played games, ate good food, and just hung out together. Family moments make life awesome."
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Sounds great, Mel! Glad you had a great time. Cherish the moments - they're the best!"
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Melanie said: "Absolutely, Caroline! I cherish time with family. It's when I really feel alive and happy."
[7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023] Caroline said: "I 100% agree, Mel. Hanging with loved ones is amazing and brings so much happiness. Those moments really make me thankful. Family is everything.""""

Return JSON:
```json
{{
    "dates": [
        {{
            "date_str": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "timestamp": <unix timestamp as float or null>,
            "context": "brief description of what this date refers to"
        }}
    ],
    "intervals": [
        {{
            "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "start_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "end_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "context": "brief description"
        }}
    ],
    "start_ts": <earliest unix timestamp or null>,
    "end_ts": <latest unix timestamp or null>
}}
```

If no temporal information is found, return empty lists and null timestamps.

JSON Output: /no_think
